reason: TM tracks const-ness of every const binding; Zed only SCREAMING_CASE via #match heuristic - ours is a deliberate superset of the same intent
Go parameter declarations: TM scopes them variable.parameter, Zed go query leaves them plain - keeping the ts-consistent parameter color
enum declaration names: tsserver classifies as enum (type family); Zed ts query has no enum-name capture
void in type position: TM/tsserver treat as primitive type, Zed query lists it as keyword
the constructor keyword: TM scopes as storage (keyword purple); Zed captures as function name
interface method signatures: tsserver says method (blue); Zed ts query captures as property
SCREAMING-ish class member: Zed casing heuristic vs tsserver classification
class-typed property in constructor shorthand: tsserver says class reference
